nodes.context: Umbrella organization of criminal groups in Estonia, settling conflicts and establishing boundaries.
Criminal groups of Russian origin operating in Estonia.
Criminal groups of Estonian origin operating in Estonia.

edges.evidence_quote: a traditional umbrella organisation of criminal groups in Estonia, a trade union of sorts that settles conflicts and establishes boundaries of the spheres of interest of various groups such as the Russian mafia and Estonian organized crime
edges.context: Obshchak is an umbrella organization that includes Russian mafia groups.

edges.evidence_quote: a traditional umbrella organisation of criminal groups in Estonia, a trade union of sorts that settles conflicts and establishes boundaries of the spheres of interest of various groups such as the Russian mafia and Estonian organized crime
edges.context: Obshchak is an umbrella organization that includes Estonian organized crime groups.
